dct_description_sm: drawn under the superintendence of Com. Lynch, U.S.N., at Wm. Sides Office, Balt
Relief shown by hachures. Depths shown by soundings
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian
Shows coastline of what is now Maryland County, Liberia
Text in upper left: "Senate Ex. doc. No. 1. 1st Sess. 33d. Cong."
Text in lower right: "Drawn under the Superintendence of Commdr. Lynch, U.S.N. at Wm. Side's Office, 22, Second St., Balto."
